name: rail-nest-common
description: Shared NestJS infrastructure for the rail-projects workspace: ApiKeyGuard, @Public, Neo4jExceptionFilter, ValidationPipe + Throttler factories.
author: Craig Nevins (Nev433)

scripts.prepare: npm run build && npm run cleanup:runtime-deps
scripts._comment_cleanup: After install + build, remove peer-dep runtimes from this package's own node_modules so consumers' copies are the ones loaded at runtime. Without this, Node's symlink-resolution walks up into THIS package's node_modules first and finds duplicate @nestjs/* classes, breaking Nest DI (Reflector class identity mismatch). Cleanup only runs from `prepare` (npm install lifecycle), NOT every build, so iterative `npm run build` still works after manually re-running `npm install`. See packages/nest-common/README.md.
scripts.cleanup:runtime-deps: rm -rf node_modules/@nestjs node_modules/express node_modules/rxjs node_modules/reflect-metadata node_modules/neo4j-driver
